query:
-- Understand the 553 zero-cost SasBoss services
SELECT planName, serviceType, COUNT(*) as count, 
       SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue,
       SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasRevenue
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00
GROUP BY planName, serviceType
ORDER BY hasRevenue DESC, totalRevenue DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Understand the 553 zero-cost SasBoss services
SELECT planName, serviceType, COUNT(*) as count, 
       SUM(monthlyRevenue) as totalRevenue,
       SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hasRevenue
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 0.00
GROUP BY planName, serviceType
ORDER BY hasRevenue DESC, totalRevenue DESC;
